name: Medieval RP
description:
Welcome to Medieval RPG! This bot is designed for a role-playing game in a real medieval setting without any fantasy elements. You can be anyone: a king, a knight, a mercenary, a noble lady, even an ordinary peasant - everything is limited only by your imagination.

Since the Middle Ages is mainly associated with Europe, this bot was originally designed to play in a European setting. This does not mean that your character should be exclusively exclusively European - you can easily play the role of a Chinese merchant or an African mercenary, if you want. Nothing stops you from specifying India in the initial message, but this way the bot will work worse.

There are also 2 starting messages in this bot:

1 meeting - you were born in the Middle Ages

2 meeting - isekai. You have entered the Middle Ages from the future

I wish you all an unforgettable game!
creator: Kirua_Hyung
